abilities.text: Each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

abilities.name: Disguise
abilities.text: When this Pokémon is first damaged by an attack after coming into play, prevent that damage.

abilities.name: Carefree Steps
abilities.text: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

abilities.name: Fantastical Floating
abilities.text: If you have Latias in play, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

abilities.name: Combust
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may attach a {R} Energy from your discard pile to this Pokémon. If you do, do 20 damage to this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Psychic Healing
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Happy Ribbon
abilities.text: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may draw 2 cards.

abilities.name: Dark Chase
abilities.text: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has damage on it to the Active Spot.

abilities.name: Strange Singing
abilities.text: At the beginning of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, put a random {P} Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

name: Protective Poncho
effect: As long as the Pokémon this card is attached to is on your Bench, prevent all damage done to that Pokémon by your opponent's attacks and Abilities.

name: Potion
effect: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

name: X Speed
effect: During this turn, the Retreat Cost of your Active Pokémon is 1 less.

name: Hand Scope
effect: Your opponent reveals their hand.

name: Pokédex
effect: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck.

name: Poké Ball
effect: Put a random Basic Pokémon from your deck into your hand.

name: Red Card
effect: Your opponent shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 3 cards.

name: Professor's Research
effect: Draw 2 cards.

name: Pokédex
effect: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck.

abilities.name: Powder Heal
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Water Shuriken
abilities.text: Once during your turn, you may do 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

abilities.name: Lunar Plumage
abilities.text: Whenever you attach a {P} Energy from your Energy Zone to this Pokémon, heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Nightmare Aura
abilities.text: Whenever you attach a {D} Energy from your Energy Zone to this Pokémon, do 20 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Resilience Link
abilities.text: If you have Arceus or Arceus ex in play, this Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks.

abilities.name: Defensive Whirlwind
abilities.text: This Pokémon takes −30 damage from attacks from {F} Pokémon.

abilities.name: Counterattack
abilities.text: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon, do 20 damage to the Attacking Pokémon.

abilities.name: Thunderclap Flash
abilities.text: At the end of your first turn, take a {L} Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to this Pokémon.
